title: 最终复验与 GO NO-GO 证据包

riskAssessment.reason: GO/NO-GO must reflect actual final verification and unresolved external evidence.

executionDecision.reason: Run final verification and record evidence without changing product behavior.

preReviewWarnings: Do not declare GO when any required final check or public release evidence remains unavailable.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: All R0-R10 Work Items have archived Contract/Summary evidence and local commits.
Full project, AI governance, supply-chain, public release, and PR checks are executed and recorded.
Final GO/NO-GO decision is based on evidence, with residual risks explicitly listed.
The final evidence document and R11 Work Item are archived and committed without pushing.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The remediation program needs one evidence-backed final decision rather than inferring completion from an empty active directory.
constraints: Do not push or alter public release state.
intent.rationale: A final evidence package makes remaining risks and the delivery decision reviewable.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: All required local AI and project checks pass.
Public release and supply-chain checks pass from the clean committed baseline.
Final decision records residual risks instead of inferring GO from active-task count.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
